name: Template contribution
about: Contribute a worked example, template, or anonymized real-world artifact
labels: contribution, templates
---

## What are you contributing

- [ ] PCCP example
- [ ] 510(k) section template
- [ ] Model card example
- [ ] Validation plan example
- [ ] Other:

## Source

Where does this come from? (Check all that apply)

- [ ] My own work, original
- [ ] Adapted from public FDA guidance
- [ ] Adapted from a published 510(k) clearance summary (cite the K-number)
- [ ] Anonymized from a real submission (confirm you have authorization to share)

## License

By submitting, you agree this contribution is licensed under MIT (the project license) and that you have the right to license it.

- [ ] Confirmed

## Description

What does your contribution cover? What device class, modality, or use case?

## How to test

How can a reviewer verify this works? What command renders it?
